reason: The statement does not apply to the text fragment provided. In this text fragment, Yahweh instructs Moses to send men to spy out the land of Canaan, which He has given to the children of Israel. The narrative focuses on the reconnaissance mission and the subsequent reactions of the spies and the people, rather than on the Hebrews being captive in a foreign land and worshiping other gods. There is no indication of Yahweh being angry with them in this context for those reasons.
